payload.compiled_summary: OpenFOAM: review Probe OpenFOAM through artifact://environment-spec/eng_openfoam_docker, Confirm the current Phase 2 gate state for OpenFOAM. Checklist OpenFOAM pack links to the intended environment spec(s), OpenFOAM adapter and evidence bundle reference the same runtime verification report, OpenFOAM anti-patterns and failure signatures match the module class and runtime path. Watch anti-patterns Using OpenFOAM for using openfoam as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside core engineering workflows., Skipping the linked health check and provenance capture for artifact://environment-spec/eng_openfoam_docker., Crossing the adapter boundary for OpenFOAM without a typed contract tied to openfoam executable workflows for core engineering workflows..
